action.reasoning: Observation: Iteration 15 completed a 50-epoch training run (~86 min) with the 768-dim 8-layer MPNN + JK + virtual node. Best val AP reached 0.2573 (EMA 0.2574), notably higher than iteration 13's 0.2472 which yielded test AP 0.2383. Remaining time is only ~39 minutes, so no more training is feasible. Analysis: The model is the same architecture as the current best test checkpoint, but trained longer with EMA. The validation improvement suggests test AP should increase. I must ensure predict.py robustly loads whatever checkpoint format was saved (plain state_dict or dict with state_dict/ema_state_dict keys) and submit eval immediately. Decision: Rewrite predict.py to be maximally robust regarding checkpoint formats and inference, then submit eval for checkpoints/best.pt without touching model.py or train.py.
action.command: echo 'predict.py updated, checkpoint exists:' && ls -lh checkpoints/best.pt
